summary: A very brief post from 2004 where Dan Shapiro promotes the Rechargeable Battery Recycling Corporation (RBRC) as a resource for recycling cordless power tool batteries. He encourages readers to recycle their batteries to prevent heavy metals from entering the environment, with a lighthearted nod to local wildlife benefiting from the effort.
key_points: Cordless power tool batteries contain heavy metals that can harm the environment if not properly disposed of
The Rechargeable Battery Recycling Corporation (RBRC) offers a recycling solution for these batteries
Small individual actions like battery recycling contribute to protecting local ecosystems
money_quotes: Your local forest, stream, creek, or spotted owl nest will thank me for it
key_insight: Responsible disposal of power tool batteries through dedicated recycling programs helps keep heavy metals out of local ecosystems.
